authorityNote: UI audit evidence ledger only; not an operational backlog or queue authority.

policy.rule: Every new finding must be fixed in the same cycle or logged with a next action and regression status.

findings.title: Dashboard service worker component existed but was never mounted
findings.repro: Push controls could render, but the app never registered /sw.js because RegisterSW was unused in the shell.

findings.title: Several workforce mutation routes bypassed the fixture-aware agent proxy
findings.repro: The dashboard was mixing direct fetches to the agent server with proxy-backed endpoints, which broke deterministic audit coverage.

findings.title: EoBQ still has non-blocking lint warnings in older UI components
findings.repro: Run npm run lint in projects/eoq. The command passes, but there are still warnings in legacy visual components.

findings.title: EoBQ live smoke missed a missing reference-detail GET and was using unrealistic dialogue payloads
findings.repro: The live EoBQ smoke returned 405 for /api/references/[id] and 500s for chat, narrate, and choices because the reference detail route only supported DELETE and the smoke payload did not reflect the real game-state shape.
findings.nextAction: Redeploy the EoBQ tenant on Workshop and keep the live smoke in the recurring audit loop.

findings.title: Clipboard and export affordances were still tracked as manual-only coverage
findings.repro: The registry still required a manual exploratory pass for copy/export flows across direct chat, agent threads, and service drill-downs because the Playwright harness did not capture browser clipboard writes or blob downloads deterministically.
